name: Body Paints
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the shampoo into two or more portions based on the number of children participating.
2. Stir in enough powdered tempera paint to achieve a medium-density color consistency.
3. The children can apply this mixture onto their bodies, creating shapes and designs by lathering.
4. The body paints will come off easily when the children run through sprinklers.
